utility_evaluation.REASONING: First, count the number of items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget — total of 5 items. Next, check the final coverage plan to see if each appears and is fully specified with all details. 1) health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health insurance with plan names and costs (monthly and annual) — fully specified. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with plan name and costs — fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with plan name and costs — fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes services (empty list is acceptable as per format) and costs — fully specified. 5) total_budget: includes complete monthly and annual cost breakdown — fully specified. Therefore, all 5 out of 5 items are included and correctly detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four main insurance selections: LifeFirst Standard Plan (€100/month) for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan (€65/month) for mental health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage for property coverage, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel coverage. From the ground-truth ratings, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for physical health has a rating of 9 under primary_health_coverage → physical_health. The 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for mental health also has a rating of 9 under primary_health_coverage → mental_health. 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' is found under property_protection → home_content with a rating of 6. 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' is found under mobility_coverage → travel_insurance with a rating of 6. The additional services section is empty, so no mapping is needed for that.
